reframed_paper_sentence: Within the sampled range w0 in [-1.30, -0.70], beta1_max shows no significant dependence on w0 at fixed (Om,s8) (partial r=-0.015, p=0.836); the response slope d(beta1_max)/d(w0) is indistinguishable from zero (OLS -76, 95% CI [-1050, +929]). DESI's deficit is not reproduced by any sampled cosmology, and the flat, sign-ambiguous w0 response admits no finite linear extrapolation to DESI. We therefore report the deficit as an anomaly relative to the w0CDM (wa=0) mock suite, not as a physical exclusion of a particular w0.
notes: w0 analysis uses the labelled subset (pilot CSV merged into the npz). The if-linear w0_needed is reported ONLY to state the extrapolation factor; it is not a physical exclusion.
